entry.title: Re: ServiceLayer post Picklist update error - 1470000838...
entry.content:
Dear @Maya_Shiff ,

 

thank you, but I am using SL call from Integration Framework v2 scenario. Note you suggested is relevant for DI API. Also, I'm using 10.0 FP2111 on this installation, and no batches have been allocated to the Sales Order. Picklist has been created without Batch allocation, is it possible that I'm missing the initial step of assigning Batches to the Sales Order?

 

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: Incorrect accouting entries in Partial settlement doc...
entry.content:
Hi Rampe, 

You need to make sure to have the UOM as split criteria in the profile of business volume. 

When several line item where only the UOM differs, the system will only reverse accrual on the first line found for this material.

entry.title: Not allow to use the Time Type without the previous year's Time Account having finished
entry.content:
The idea of this blog is to show how we can create a rule when we have two time account types, and the employee can only use one Time Account when the other is at 0. For example, we have the Time Account from last year's vacation and the Time Account for this year. You can only use this year's Time account when last year's Time Account is used

  • Time Account - Vacation
  • Time Account - Vacation Prev Year

Rule to be created

 

You will then need to associate this rule with the Time Type Vacation

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App Error
entry.content: I've similar issue with iOS, please review my post: iOS build fails - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content: Are you still having problems or has it started working now?

entry.title: Re: Sap Fiori Element Composition of one issues when usin...
entry.content: Thank you so much @Ajit_K_Panda I added the annotation manually using the target in this way, I was not aware of accessing the grandchild like this ''limitsGroupVersion/dimensionLimit' and it worked, I am still using the composition of one and it seems to be working without any issue(I know in this example Group Version is not really need it, but the business case it is more complex and using something like this could make more sense) , I was able to create and save the grand child (dimension limit entity under the limitsGroupVersion) entity.

entry.title: Re: ABAP SDK for Google Cloud - Insider story of Engineering Excellence
entry.content: This is a great stuff that Google has created.

entry.title: Re: Check if PDF is interactive
entry.content:
Hello.

 

I dont create pdf from template. I have already created PDF files on my disk. Some of them editable. And some of them - not editable.

I upload this files (with FM GUI_UPLOAD). And then I need to check - If uploaded PDF is editable or not.

entry.title: Re: Hello and help?
entry.content:
Hello? Just wondering if anyone out there has any recommendations for best practice set up of Initial and Refresher (retraining) that is difference. 

So the use case is this:

Learning Item 1 = Initial training. To be completed within the first 90 days of start date.
Learning Item 2 = Refresher training (Retraining). To be completed 3 years from start date.

Anyone got any ideas on the best way to set this up in the SAP SuccessFactors system?

entry.title: Re: Workflow user decision step with link of FIORI screen
entry.content:
Dear Sandra,

thanks for responding. The method

cl_lsapi_manager=>navigate_to_intent(

doesn't exists in ECC(Backend). My wf is located in ECC.

Would you suggest t copy the Method from frontend NWgateway server  to ECC an duse it.

Will it work? Kindly help.

ALso kindly guide how can I pass the "data from WOrkflow container" or "user decision step workitem id" to Odata as there could be multiple instances of workflow and I can't see any linkage between FIORI link task and its odata service.SAP_WAPI_READ_CONTAINER asks for WORKITEM_ID.

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP error " Handler not implemented; Method: INS...
entry.content: But is there a specific activity that requires to explicit add something in that table? Looking at the steps for BO Dynamic behavior there is none.

entry.title: Re: Process Overview in SAP Enable now
entry.content:
Hi Nayeem,

Yes, it is definitely possible to create overview content, e.g. details of end-to-end business processes in Enable Now.  These could be created as Books and Book Pages.  You could also show users how to complete the steps of each business process using Simulations.

Based on your question, I assume that you have quite a lot to learn about Enable Now.  If I were you, I would start with the Getting Started with Enable Now video content but also take a look at the Community.  All of the topics that you mention in your question are covered by video content.

For standard content on SAP Business Processes, I would start on help.sap.com.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: There are login issues.
entry.content:
Hi Hernan,

This dialog box typically appears because there is an issue with Single Sign On (SSO).  When SSO is not able to authenticate the user, Enable Now prompts the user to log in using a manual user ID.

Come of the common issues that cause SSO to fail are covered in the following KBAs, but I recommend that you engage your network team to see why SSO is failing:

SSO prerequisites 
Authenticate in a new window 
3rd party cookies blocked

Hope this helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content: Yes, problem persists until 2024/04/07, 1:21:03 AM!

entry.title: Mass Change Equipment User Status using Master Data Info. center Fiori tile - Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When trying to mass change the user status of equipment using the "Master Data Information Center" Fiori tile, bellow error message appears. 

"Status is not user status"

The list contained only 5 equipment which are having the initial status of "INIT" and intended to change to next status "INSE". (list does not contain any Functional locations)

Following is the user status profile and it does not contain any dependencies,

Any possible reason for the error message (message itself is not helpful - no error details or ID)

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Can I delete any Resource line from product tree by ServiceLayer?
entry.content:
Hi,

I use Service layer with PHP on Linux. In my situation there may be one or more than one Resource lines in the Product Tree. I want to delete specific resource line or lines  from Product tree.

I use here and there is ProductTrees function. But I see DELETE function deletes all the Product Tree not the specific lines?

How can I delete specific line from Product tree? I think there is same problem if I want to add new line in to existing Product Tree?!

Regards,

Mucip:)

entry.title: Why does a PI item duplicates itself after counting?
entry.content:
Why is the item duplicated after entering the quantities?
Is it due to different Unit of Measure? Initially CAR was used for GR/Putaway. The count was probably entered as PC instead of CAR units.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I'm a transitioning military logistics officer, and a first generation college graduate. Although I work in logistics for the US Army, I consider the transition to logistics in the civilian sector to be a "mid-life" career change(the late 20's aren't too mid-life, but I don't feel as young as a once was).

I'd like to enter the SAP ecosystem, but I don't believe my limited experience will suffice. This is a fantastic program that I'd greatly like to be considered for. Thank you!

entry.title: Download Oracle 12c Installation Software
entry.content:
we are unable see Oracle 12c(12.1.0.2) installation  Software downloads.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Download Oracle 12c Installation Software
entry.content:
Please follow the steps below to download Oracle 12c(12.1.0.2) installation.
1. Access SWDC URL:
https://support.sap.com/en/my-support/software-downloads.html?anchorId=section

2. Click on the button "Access Software Downlads in SAP for Me".

3. Choose "DATABASE" > "Database and Database Patches" > oracle > INFO > Oracle 12.1 Software (64-bit) > Installation

4. Select your OS type.

entry.title: Re: Goods Receipt Outbound Delivery Requirement Type B is...
entry.content: Well explained. Thank you Dominik!

entry.title: Re: RE-FX Implementation Approach
entry.content:
Hi see below a direct copy paste from the F1 help information. In short Asset Accounting will create the RoU asset in FI-AA while the direct balance sheet posting does not create and asset master in FI-AA.

Integration Type

If the flow type Balance-Sheet Capitalization is used, you can define how the capitalization (asset transactions) are to be carried out:

  • 1 = asset accounting
    The relevant transactions are processed with the asset accounting interface.
  • 2 = direct balance sheet postings
    The relevant transactions are updated directly on the relevant balance sheet accounts.

Note that reference flow types ( relationship type CE6 = direct balance sheet posting) must be defined for flow type Assets and Depreciation.

Dependencies

Note that you can maintain this indicator in the Customizing settings for Valuation-Specific Attributes for Contract Type in Company Code and in the Customizing settings for the Valuation Rule. The definition for the valuation rule has the highest priority. This is followed by the contract type and then the company code.

If an integration type was not specified for the relevant valuation rule, the relevant company code, and the relevant contract type, Asset Accounting is used.

 

Regards, Andre

entry.title: Re: Sap B1 Patch 2311 sluggish and slowing down system
entry.content: Finally a hotfix!  2402HF1 is here promising to rid this annoyance... enjoy.

entry.title: Re: Field for Training Provider at Item Level
entry.content: Hi @FredericMONEGER. Yes, it will be a 1 item tagged to 1 training provider relationship. However, 1 training provider could be the service provider for many items. The estimated number of the training providers can be very large because we are a global organisation..

entry.title: Simplifying your Data Readiness and Migration for SAP S/4HANA, Cloud & AI
entry.content:
Day 8 of 30 Days of EA Learning

In this session Thomas Iseler introduced us to a transformative approach to SAP migrations, emphasizing the critical role of data readiness and simplification. By leveraging the Jivs platform developed by his Data Migration International (DMI), Iseler addresses common data-related challenges in migrations, retirements, and system consolidations.

His presentation focused on the strategic decision-making process for identifying which data to migrate and which to archive, proposing a solution that significantly reduces project timelines and costs. Iseler elaborated on the innovative use of their platform to handle both SAP and non-SAP data, ensuring a comprehensive migration strategy that includes open items, master data, and historical data management. The approach offers a substantial reduction in operational costs by retiring legacy systems and provides a seamless integration for accessing historical data within SAP S/4HANA, presenting a cost-effective, efficient, and compliant path to digital transformation.

Key Themes – AI Assisted: 

  • Data Migration Simplification: Emphasizing the simplification of data migration to SAP S/4HANA, Cloud, and AI platforms through automation and strategic decision-making.
  • Platform Utilization: Introduction of a platform capable of handling both SAP and non-SAP data, facilitating faster and more efficient migration processes.
  • Cost Reduction and Efficiency: Highlighting significant cost savings and efficiency improvements in migration projects, including operational cost reductions and time savings.
  • Data Management Strategy: Discussing strategies for managing, cleansing, and quality improvement of data during migration, emphasizing the importance of selecting which data to migrate and which to retire.
  • Integration and Compatibility: Showcasing the integration capabilities with SAP S/4HANA and the seamless user experience, despite the background complexities of data storage and management.
  • Customer Success Stories: Providing examples of customer successes to illustrate the practical benefits and outcomes of adopting the discussed approaches and technologies.

Remember:

“Focus on making the relevant data available quickly. The right data is critical for All” - Thomas Iseler

Access Presentation: Here         

Watch the YouTube Video of Thomas’s Presentation: Here  


CTA
For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and Follow Paul Kurchina - https://www.linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina/ 

Flag Photo with Thomas Iseler

entry.title: Re: Qualtrics & Sf LMS Integration Best Practice & Experi...
entry.content: Hi @BrandyPelzel, the dashboard capability is one and also the fact that the Sf survey function has several quirks like mandatory "NA" field for all questions, only sending to participants who have received the completed grade (sometimes, it's more important to find out why are people not passing the course) etc. As to whether it is possible to implement L3 via Qualtrics is something I am keen to find out as well. I will post an update here is I get new insights from other sources.

entry.title: x
Streamlining HR Document Requests with Custom MDF in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Introduction :


An integral aspect of HR operations is managing document requests, ensuring employees have access to essential documents promptly. Traditionally, this process could be cumbersome and time-consuming. However, with advancements in technology,  Success Factors Employee Central (SF EC) offers a solution through Custom MDF (Meta Data Framework), enabling organizations to streamline HR document requests efficiently.


Imagine a scenario where an employee needs to request a crucial document from HR, such as an employment verification letter or a salary statement. With Custom MDF in SF EC, this process becomes streamlined and user-friendly.

Streamlining HR Document Requests with Custom MDF

Follow these steps to create a custom MDF and business rules to trigger the workflow for the custom MDF.

Step 1 : Create a parent child objects in object definition named HR document Request as parent object and HR document Request Child as a child object. 

 

 

This the parent object with effective dating as basic.

 

This is the child object with fields document type and status and comments. Keep the effective dating is from Parent object. Make the status and document type field as pick list and create pick list for these two fields.

Go to Admin Center > Picklist Center and provide the picklist value for both document type and status fields. 

 

Assign the pick list value to fields in child object by clicking on details and copy paste the external code of the pick list under valid values sources.

 

Step 2:  Provide the Association between the child and parent object give Miscellaneous permission to both objects

Step 3: Configure UI from Admin Center > Manage Configuration UI and create an ui for the Parent object HR document Request and provide an ID for the UI.

 

Go to Admin Center > People Profile and create a new block and assign the created UI screen under Live Profile MDF information block .

Once People profile has been configured now provide the RBP permission to both employee and HR for the created object. Admin center > Permission Roles > employee Views and Miscellaneous Permission.

Step 4: Configure the business rules to set the status fields default while creating an HR Document request and to trigger the workflow once MDF gets saved.

configure the Workflow that has to be triggered and assign in the business rule.

 

This rule is trigger the workflow once the MDF is submitted.

This rule is set the status field by default to pending.

once these rules were configured add these rules in the Parent object

Processes Flow: 

The process begins with the employee initiating the document request. Employees can easily access the Custom MDF object designated for document requests. They provide necessary details such as the type of document required and the effective date needed. This empowers employees with the ability to manage their own document needs efficiently.
Employee submits the MDF request with proper letter template and effective date for the letter.


HR manager receives the workflow and email notification is sent to HR manager.

 

Hr opens the workflow request and  click on details and attach the required document that generated as of date and kept the status as completed and approves the request.


HR attaches the generated document from Take action screen of employee and submits the document here in details and approves the request.



Once the HR manager approves the request and attaches the document, the employee receives a notification informing them of the approval. They can then conveniently access the Custom MDF object and download the requested document. This self-service functionality empowers employees, reducing dependency on HR personnel for routine document retrieval tasks.


The employee can download the document from the Custom MDF.

Conclusion

Custom MDF in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central revolutionizes HR document management, providing organizations with a powerful tool to streamline document requests efficiently. By empowering employees and HR personnel with self-service capabilities and seamless workflow automation, organizations can enhance productivity, compliance, and employee satisfaction.

entry.title: Re: Limit OCN Library to a Group of Employees
entry.content: Hi everyone, just wanted to share some updates I received through other sources. The method mentioned in my question is sufficient. However, additional check with the content provider will be good to ensure access through other means (not through SuccessFactors learning, i.e through content providers' own URL) is also properly managed.

entry.title: Re: Converting Existing Documents to PDF Using SAP Busine...
entry.content: I will check this out. Thank you for the assistance, best regards

entry.title: Managed RAP and errors (FAILED) from a determination.
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to determine what best practice is in managed RAP for error handling for determinations and validations. 

If I have a determination with the possibility of raising and error (Let's say it has to determine a specific value in my model from an API call on create) . This API call could fail, and I could add a message to the REPORTED structure but as there is no FAILED structure in a determination, I cannot flag it as a failure which I might want to do.

I don't want to duplicate the code in a validation and do a second API call just to check. What would be a clean way to handle this scenario in a managed solution?

entry.title: What is the complete list of function restrictions during software update?
entry.content:
During the system update uptime, certain actions are not executable. End users are trying to grasp the complete scope of function restrictions during the system update in order to plan work tasks in advance.

While several notes provide guidance, it appears that they do not cover all the restrictions. For example, manually creating a product master encounters the error "Function locked, software update running in parallel," which has not been mentioned in any existing notes.

Therefore, I would like to inquire if there are any notes or KBA lists that provide a comprehensive list of function restrictions during the system update uptime? Thank you.

p.s.: Below are the published notes regarding the function restrictions we can find so far:

  • 3381225 - Error : Function locked, software update running in parallel when running tasks in Data Monitor - SAP for Me
  • 3083137 - Error "Function locked, software update running in parallel" in VF01 when creating a billing document - SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me
  • 3042314 - Hotfix Collection deployment for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me
  • 2996675 - Migrate your Data App – Migration Cockpit: Migration objects fail to generate; inconsistency found or, system error during preparation appears due to SAP S/4HANA Cloud system upgrades - SAP for Me
  • 3097708 - Release upgrade for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2-System and 3-System Landscape - SAP for Me
  • 3024158 - Blue-Green Deployment for Hotfix Collection for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me

Best Regards

Fancy

entry.title: Re: Multiple Instructors in Instructor-led Training and V...
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I received inputs from other sources and would like to share in case anyone have the same points of interest. 

 

For VLS, if secondary instructor is also possible, would the secondary instructor have the same Teams role as the primary instructor? In particular: 

  1. white boards
  2. breakout rooms
  3. Process VLS Attendance i.e. By default LMS takes the time between when the primary instructor launched and ended it. In the absence of the primary instructor for one or multiple segments, will the system use the time between when the secondary instructor launched and ended it as an alternative data point.

The answer to the above is no, secondary instructor will not have the same Teams role as the primary instructor. Primary instructor will have the presenter rights by default, depending on MS Teams policy of your organization, the primary instructor can grant presenter rights to secondary instructor, but only during the Teams session. Also, the attendance tracking will adhere to only the primary instructor even if additional presenter rights have been granted.

 

In addition, assuming multiple instructors can be added now, is there a way such that at the course evaluation, feedback can be given to individual instructors, rather than generic question that is applicable to all instructors involved?

There is a way to implement this. In the survey configuration, a section can be configured such that it repeats for each of the instructors listed in the training segments.

entry.title: Re: Your Guide to Calling S/4HANA APIs from SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi Daniel Wroblewski,

I have used a communication user with basic authentication for calling S4HANA public cloud APIs from SAP Build App
and SAP digital access has been counted.
Are there any additional costs about SAP digital access with this case?
Does SAP count digital access from non-SAP interfaces only?

Best Regards,

Nawakan P.

entry.title: Re: Machines grouping in work centers for Textile Industry
entry.content:
You question is about the work center definition.

Firstly the confirmation object is work center, so if you use one work center with several machines, the confirmation just can be specified one work center, cannot specify one machine. The quantity of the machine is just used for the capacity, not be used for confirmation.

If you want to specify one machine in confirmation, you can define each machine as a work center, and maintain Alternative sequence for each operation in the routing, then do the confirmation for the actual operations.

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence hub universal adoption
entry.content: Currently, there isn't a universal push date for TIH.

entry.title: Re: The CPI URL is not showing any data
Re: Do i need to set up org structure in both dev system...
entry.content:
Hi,

There might be an error in the activation which is why it is stuck at 60%. Please raise a ticket to the CBC component so that they can check it out. You should have created two projects one for 100 (customizing) tenant and other for 80 (development) tenant. The activities are independent. 

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Learn SAC Advanced Formula Actions for Common Business Scenarios In No Time
entry.content:
@uladzislau_pralat 
Thank you for your very informative article.
Based on this article of yours, I had implemented a script related to "Aggregating Dimension Members into Different Groups" in the latest version of SAC.
The model is a classic account model, and the dimension settings are modified to apply to the latest version.

(1) UL data
1.Transactinal Data

2.DATA 

3.Account 

4. Model details in SAC

I then tried to execute the data action using the script you provided, but unfortunately I did not get the results you provided. Nothing happens.
(2) Advanced Formula in SAC

(3)Result of executing a data action
1.Before execution

2.After execution

If you don't mind, could you give me some advice on how to solve this problem?
Thank you and kind regards,
Satoko Nakayama

entry.title: Re: Usage of UI Annotations in CDS views and Business Application Studio
entry.content: Can  you show your source CDS view? I got this error while creating Fiori ALP

entry.title: BOM template qty in PO
entry.content:
When the quantity of the parent item is changed, I would like to change the quantity of the component items accordingly. I have created a query to see if I can do it in FMS but it doesn't work. Please let me know if there is a good solution.

SELECT $[$38.11.NUMBER] * X.[ParentQTY] FROM( SELECT $[$38.11.NUMBER] * T0.[Qauntity] AS "ParentQTY" , T0.[Code] , T0.[TreeType] FROM OITT T0 WHERE T0.[TreeType] = 'T' AND $[$38.1.0] = T0.[Code] ) X INNER JOIN ITT1 T1 ON T1.[Father] = X.[Code] WHERE $[$38.1.0] = T1.[Code]

SAP Business One

entry.title: Test Script Download Error in SAP Signavio Process Navigator
entry.content:
Hello, Expert.

I'm tring to downlaod test script about Scope Item. 

In SAP for Me > SAP Signavio Process Navigator > SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Thank you for read this!

entry.title: Re: BAPI_CUSTOMERQUOTATION_CHANGE Quantity update

You need to fill in SCHEDULE_LINES & SCHEDULE_LINESX accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors
entry.content:
@SilvioCanha  unfortunately I am not sure if there is a similar post for non-SAP sources.
I would suggest to have a look at below links - these allow you to apply filter for specific source system connections (e.g. Generic ODATA or Generic JDBC):

  • Integrating Data and Managing Spaces in SAP Datasphere
    -> Connection Types Overview
  • Administering SAP Datasphere
    -> Preparing Connectivity for Connections

entry.title: Chinese Blog review
entry.content:
Hello colleague,

I created my first blog in Chinese last week, but it's still under review today.
https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogworkflowpage/blog-id/shanghaiblog-board/article-id/23

How long will a new Chinese blog be reviewed?

Best Regards,
Kevin

entry.title: Concur (other data field) > S/4Hana FI Posting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In Concur Financial Integration Posting to S/4Hana, the first table that is being updated is the BPKF-BSEG table with the aid of a BADI.  Can this be extended to the universal journal (ACDOCA) too? Using BADI alone can perform the update?

Thanks in advance!

SAP ERP integration with SAP Concur solutions SAP Concur

entry.title: Post Good Issue against production order API
entry.content:
Please provide Post Good Issue against the production order API.

I have already checked the business accelerator hub but could not find API so please provide API.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Post Good Issue against production order API
entry.content:
You may use ODATA API API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV to post the goods issue.

use GoodsMovementCode = 03 (Goods Issue), GoodsMovementType = 261

Please check this online documentation for this API:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3f57e7df4a114edabffe8b2d581a59ed/8bb0d08295044ee3af444b4f2a6e4457.html?locale=en-US

You may also use SOAP API MaterialDocumentCreateRequest_Async_In to post the goods issue:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3f57e7df4a114edabffe8b2d581a59ed/3fe61a3650e343c8bd1a09132d667c57.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: E_ACTAI_2403-SAP Certified Specialist – Project Manager
entry.content:
Hi,

This is a specialist exam, the second link (80 questions) is the right one.

entry.title: Re: method CMD_EI_API=>MAINTAIN_BAPI to update KNVI tax data
entry.content: I found the issue, some ALAND - TATYP will not shown when running this API. I tried another ALAND - TATYP and it successfully updated

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between creating BOM in CS01 v...
entry.content: Hi, Like subcontracting, separate BOM maintenance will also be required for different BOM usages such as Sales BOM, Engineering BOM etc. Also 1 company/plant can have the setup for both discrete and process manufacturing scenarios. Within Process manufacturing, there can be authorization scenarios where BOM to be maintained by different users separately, and recipe data such as MQC formula details, operation/phase details etc, shouldn’t be visible to those users.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:

Unfortunately the hash does not seem correct. Can you make sure your hash has the correct phrase and your correct community ID, without any extra trailing characters/spaces?

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
Community ID : avinash12

Here is go with the correct #hash

bbf8282abf54344d0e3f86baa777e87fcd19cf9fd84ca15a1a9e6f91db685671

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: Nicely done, but the hash does not seem correct. Can you check? Make sure you enter the number exactly as described in the assignment, without spaces.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
We'd love to do so. Can you enter a reply to this post and provide details about company, time, number of people?

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/so-you-want-to-host-a-codejam-everything-you-need-to-know/ba-p/221415

entry.title: Re: Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors
entry.content:
@Mandar_Damle 
Assuming you are talking about the scenario in Table 6 No. [3]:
FYI - I just tested this by creating a generic extractor with delta extraction based on table VBAK -  I was able to leverage this extractor  in SAP Datasphere for all 3 remote table functionalities (federation/snapshot/real-time replication).

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
• From UI point of view, I would suggest putting the list view in Container 1 (first container) after all the other stuff we put there.
  • Where is the warning you talk about? Can you show screenshot?
  • DEBUGGING: When something like this happens to me, I try to isolate the problem:
    • Am I getting data at all? Put an alert in the logic for your data variable to see if you get back anything.
    • If you do, then I would set the repeat using the data variable and see if I get multiple instances of the list view.
    • If so, I would bind some repeated data. Remember, a common error is to bind the data variable to the specific UI properties instead of the data item in repeat

entry.title: Unable to create a Decision in Build process automation
entry.content:
hi , I am unable to create a Decision in the SAP process automation ,i can able to create a input and output variables but when i click the button of ADD RULE in the rules tab , the button not working 

i tries so many times but nothing was coming when i click the button.

Please give me the solution to add the decision , while all the learning resources have previous version which the UI itself was different.

 

The following error was coming and i can't able to add the rule.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Hmmm, I still get it as incorrect. Did you click somewhere and get the secret phrase? Did that get entered into the input box on the hash page? Want to show the hash page with the hash but blurring half of the phrase?

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements: List Report Page - Remove or hide field value retained in brackets
entry.content:
Hello,

List Report Page display of description texts via foreign key association in CDS results in field value being retained in brackets as below:

It seems this is default behavior. Is there an annotation to remove or hide the field value?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: The CPI URL is not showing any data
entry.content: Can you trace the data call going to gateway system using IWFND/TRACES and compare it with the params in the direct call?

entry.title: Re: The CPI URL is not showing any data
entry.content: but data is stored in the Data Store point. but I can't see the response in Postman.

entry.title: Re: SAP Background Job Processing
entry.content: Nice blog @Mouni_Priyanka !

entry.title: Re: Using Texts in Fiori Apps
entry.content:
@jeffrey_towell2do you have answer to this query: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-fiori-elements-list-report-page-remove-or-hide-field-value-retained-in/qaq-p/13661772

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Connection issue between SAP MII and SAP ECC
entry.content:
hi

maybe you changed the input on ECC side, and don´t reset the JcoProxy on MII side 

try: 

http://server:port/XMII/JCOProxy?mode=reset&target=IDocRepository

Robert

entry.title: Get peace of mind for evolving compliance requirements with SAP advanced compliance automation
entry.content:
Tax authorities have typically been relying on period-end declarations and cumbersome audits, leaving a chance for after the fact validations and corrections. Now the era of 'post fact' adjustments is vanishing: more and more tax authorities require all data in real-time, even before invoices are issued to customers, making compliance a must-have within your business processes in your cloud ERP.

Did you know:

  • “By 2026, half of revenues will come from products, services, or businesses that haven’t yet been created” (1)
  • “65% of consumer business leaders believe their corporate tax liability will increase as result of the Pillar One/Pillar Two project” (2)
  • New “Spanish Plastic Tax” is expected to generate approximately €724m annually (3)
  • 7 out of the 10 largest economies in the world either have introduced or plan to introduce mandatory electronic invoices for all business transactions (4)

To address your compliance needs, the GROW with SAP advanced compliance automation package, is a new commercial offering designed to help you transform, standardize and harmonize processes globally to comply locally, faster, and more efficiently. It also helps you respond to existing and upcoming e-invoicing regulations without compromising the efficiency of order to cash processes and ensure you have the adequate internal controls needed to safeguard your financial data, policies, and processes, as well as minimize the risk of noncompliance.

This first element of the package is the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance solution that helps you fulfill local compliance mandates - from electronic business documents to statutory reporting - and automate compliance processes.

The second element of the package is the SAP Risk and Assurance Management. It helps you centrally document and manage manual and automated internal controls over financial reporting, thus improving performance, protecting core data and processes.

 

Explosion of Local Compliance Obligations

 

You never go a full month without new tax news, as the digitalization journey of governments continues, resulting in more and more authorities pushing new e-invoicing regulations that are quickly becoming the new norm. And this is further going to increase with the “program announced by the European Union or tax initiatives in Japan, Saudi Arabia, Romania, Poland, Malaysia, Israel just to name a few.

This shift is motivated by various reasons, such as:

 - Preventing tax evasion

 - Increasing digitalization and controls in the public sector

 - Or simply digitalizing the economy, for instance to reduce the carbon footprint

Whatever the deciding criterion behind it, the trend is clear: all tax authorities are investing in technology and introducing more demanding digital mandates:

Indicative examples of some external obligation… by no means exhaustive list!

 

Turning Taxes into Opportunities

 

With these challenges also come opportunities. The enables seamless compliance and helps companies respond to existing and upcoming regulations efficiently, in addition to improving and protecting business processes by minimize the risk of noncompliance.

It does so by providing a future-proof compliance platform with legal changes as a service, to standardize processes while complying with local legislations. Since no company is immune to anomalies, it provides the means to reduce operational delays, detect compliance issues, accelerate remediation in time for digital reporting and address issues at the source directly.

This helps achieve the following benefits:

 

Comply with ever-evolving Digital Mandates

Lower the cost of compliance with automation

Minimize risk of non-compliance

 

 

 

o   One solution to fulfill all types of digital mandates from real time electronic documents to statutory reports

o   Continuously address increasingly complex mandates

o   Improve tax data quality and minimize the risk of noncompliance

o   Remove manual workarounds and inefficient tasks

o   Gain efficiency with standardized operations across countries.

o   Simplify implementation of new mandates and ongoing support

o   Improve financial performance and accuracy

o   ​Increase tax transparency and auditability

o   Detect compliance issues and accelerate remediation in time for digital reporting

o   Address issue at the source

With SAP’s new GROW with SAP advanced compliance automation package, we aim to get you peace of mind, and help you improve your operational agility to implement legal mandates, as you navigate a highly competitive and price sensitive environment.

If you are interested in learning more about the solutions mentioned, look at the links below:

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

  • Documentation
  • Overview video
  • Section on the SAP Help Portal

SAP Risk and Assurance Management

  • Documentation
  • Overview video
  • Section on the SAP Help Portal

 

Sources:

(1) The state of new business building, McKinsey, December 2021

(2) Deloitte, Global Tax and the impact of BEPS on consumer business, Deloitte’s 2020 global survey on the OECD’s Base Erosion and Profit Shifting (BEPS)

(3) Plastic taxes: a guide to new legislation in Europe, February 2023

(4) SAP S/4HANA update for 2023 – Comply with new regulations and respond to the latest compliance trends with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, October 2023

entry.title: Re: Unlock the full potential of your enterprise data with SAP Datasphere Catalog

So far the youtube videos have little technical content that doesn't resonate with any techies. Can you point me to something technical on this product?

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action: How to loop date from the start date and end date maintained in a dimension
entry.content: Hi Nikhil - hope you are well, can you pls get in touch shanelloyd57@gmail.com

entry.title: Business Partner Creation using ODATA V2.0
entry.content:
Objective:Business Partner  Creation using ODATA V2.0

Step 1. To Create OData go to T-Code SEGW.

Step 2. Create a New Project(Ex--> Z_CUSTOMER)

Step 3. Then create a Entity Type(Ex--> Customer)

Step 4 . In properties, insert field by referring below attached screenshot. 

Step 5. Source Code

1. Get EntitySet Method

method CUSTOMERSET_GET_ENTITYSET.
data lwa_entity LIKE LINE OF et_entityset.
SELECT * FROM kna1 INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_cust).
LOOP AT lt_cust INTO data(lwa_cust).
SELECT SINGLE city1, country, region
INTO (@lwa_entity-city, @lwa_entity-country, @lwa_entity-region)
FROM adrc
WHERE addrnumber = @lwa_cust-adrnr.
lwa_entity-name1 = lwa_cust-name1.
lwa_entity-businesspartner = lwa_cust-kunnr.
lwa_entity-businesscategory = '2'.
lwa_entity-partnergroup = 'Customer'.
append lwa_entity to et_entityset.
ENDLOOP.
endmethod.

2. Get Entity Method

METHOD customerset_get_entity.

DATA : bp TYPE kunnr.
DATA : address TYPE bapicustomer_04.
DATA : gen_detail TYPE bapicustomer_kna1.
DATA : comp_Detail TYPE bapicustomer_05.
DATA : return TYPE bapiret1.

DATA(lwa_key) = it_key_tab[ name = 'CustomerCode' ].
IF lwa_key-value IS NOT INITIAL.
bp = lwa_key-value.
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_CUSTOMER_GETDETAIL2'
EXPORTING
customerno = bp
* COMPANYCODE =
IMPORTING
customeraddress = address
customergeneraldetail = gen_detail
customercompanydetail = comp_detail
return = return
* TABLES
* CUSTOMERBANKDETAIL =
* CUSTOMERIBANDETAIL =
* CUSTOMERSEPADETAIL =
.
IF sy-subrc = 0 and return-type <> 'E'.
er_entity-city = address-city.
er_entity-country = address-country.
er_entity-region = address-region.
er_entity-name1 = address-name.
er_entity-businesspartner = bp.
er_entity-businesscategory = '2'.
er_entity-partnergroup = 'Customer'.
else.
er_entity-businesspartner = 'Not Found.'.
er_entity-return = 'No customer found.'.
ENDIF.
ELSE.
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /iwbep/cx_mgw_not_impl_exc
EXPORTING
textid = /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception=>business_error
method = 'Please pass Customer Key to get the details.'.
ENDIF.

3. Create Entity Method

METHOD customerset_create_entity.
    DATA centraldataorg TYPE BAPIBUS1006_CENTRAL_ORGAN.
    DATA partner_data TYPE bapibus1006_central.
    DATA address TYPE bapibus1006_address.
    DATA bp TYPE bapibus1006_head-bpartner.
    DATA return TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2.



    DATA ls_request_input_data  TYPE zcl_z_customer_mpc=>ts_customer.
    io_data_provider->read_entry_data( IMPORTING es_data = ls_request_input_data ).
    IF ls_request_input_data IS NOT INITIAL.

      partner_data-searchterm2  = 'SaleForceCustomer'.
      centraldataorg-name1 = ls_request_input_data-name1.
      address-city = ls_request_input_data-city.
      address-country = ls_request_input_data-country.
      address-region = ls_request_input_data-region.
      address-c_o_name = ls_request_input_data-name1.
      address-time_zone = ls_request_input_data-time_zone.
      address-postl_cod1 = '123456'.
      address-langu = 'EN'.


      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_BPCONSUMER_CREATE'
        EXPORTING
*         PARTNER_EXTERNAL_NO       =
          partner_group             = 'BP02'
          partner_category          = '2'
          partner_central_data      = partner_data
*         CENTRAL_DATA_PERSON       =
          central_data_organization = centraldataorg
*         CENTRAL_DATA_GROUP        =
          partner_addr              = address
*         DUPLICATE_MESSAGE_TYPE_ADDR       =
*         ACCEPT_ERROR_ADDR         =
        IMPORTING
          businesspartner           = bp
        TABLES
*         PARTNER_TEL_ADDR          =
*         PARTNER_FAX_ADDR          =
*         PARTNER_TELETEX_ADDR      =
*         PARTNER_TELEX_ADDR        =
*         PARTNER_EMAIL_ADDR        =
*         PARTNER_RML_ADDR          =
*         PARTNER_X400_ADDR         =
*         PARTNER_RFC_ADDR          =
*         PARTNER_PRT_ADDR          =
*         PARTNER_SSF_ADDR          =
*         PARTNER_URI_ADDR          =
*         PARTNER_PAGER_ADDR        =
*         PARTNER_NOTE_ADDR         =
*         PARTNER_NOTECOM_ADDR      =
*         PARTNER_TEL_NONADDRESS    =
*         PARTNER_FAX_NONADDRESS    =
*         PARTNER_TELETEX_NONADDRESS        =
*         PARTNER_TELEX_NONADDRESS  =
*         PARTNER_EMAIL_NONADDRESS  =
*         PARTNER_RML_NONADDRESS    =
*         PARTNER_X400_NONADDRESS   =
*         PARTNER_RFC_NONADDRESS    =
*         PARTNER_PRT_NONADDRESS    =
*         PARTNER_SSF_NONADDRESS    =
*         PARTNER_URI_NONADDRESS    =
*         PARTNER_PAGER_NONADDRESS  =
*         PARTNER_NOTECOM_NONADDRESS        =
*         PARTNER_ADDRESSDUPLICATES =
*         PARTNER_BANK_ATTR         =
          return                    = return.

      IF  bp IS  NOT INITIAL.
        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_BUPA_ROLE_ADD'
          EXPORTING
            businesspartner     = bp
            businesspartnerrole = 'FLCU01'
*           DIFFERENTIATIONTYPEVALUE       =
*            TABLES
*           RETURN              =
          .

        IF ls_request_input_data-commit IS NOT INITIAL.
          COMMIT WORK.
*          CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
*              EXPORTING
*                WAIT          = ' '
*              IMPORTING
*          return                    = return.
          ER_ENTITY-businesspartner =  bp.
          er_entity-name1 = ls_request_input_data-name1.

        ELSE.
          "// error handling
        ENDIF.
      ELSE.
        "// error handling
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

🙂Thank you

Pranjali Sharma

entry.title: Re: Add Custom Action to Object Page Header toolbar using...
entry.content:
Hi Rakesh,

The links you provide are for extension projects using the extension API. Adaptation projects are quite different. This section in your first link describes adding a button to a table toolbar in an adaption project. It's a similar process for object page changes:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/a269671fc49e4c75920c108961bf31f2

entry.content:
The payee/Payer field is not showing in the Fiori app(Manage Journal Entries), but it is showing in FBL1N using SAP GUI. What is the fix for this?

Fiori APP:

Using SAP GUI:

Can anyone help me on how to link a documents in SAP JAM to EC , so that, end user can access it on the tile which is available on his employee EC home page.

Thanks so much,

Ambika

entry.content:
How to check the reservation number and components per the production order number.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content: Please feel free to call us by our first name. Your ID starting with PXX will be required to issue digital badges. Please use RSVP option on top right as yes, we will confirm on first come first serve basis. Thank you for your patience and support. We will update you in case of any changes.

entry.title: How to check the reservation number and components per the production order number.
entry.content:
How to check the reservation number and components per the production order number.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check the reservation number and components pe...
entry.content:
App "Monitor Production / Planned Orders " (COOIS )  can be used for this.
Steps:
1. In the initial screen, choose List : Components.
2. Enter production order number then execute.
3. In the details screen, change Layout to show column 'Reservation' .

entry.title: Re: BOM template qty in PO
entry.content: "When the quantity of the parent item is changed" changed where? "to see if I can do it in FMS" where is the fms?

entry.title: Re: Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors
entry.content:
Hello @ClaudiaFiess,

what @Mandar_Damle writes initially have also been my first thoughts:

This Blog is really great, and I would have loved to read this already one year ago in the official SAP Help pages... but what you found there made you wonder, rather understand 😞

Why do we, as customers, see such information only in Blogs and not initially in the official help pages?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements: List Report Page - Remove or hide...
entry.content:
Hey,

yes it is possible. Use UI.textArrangement Annotation in this case. With #TEXT_ONLY only the text is shown.

Best regards,

Sascha

entry.title: In the S4hana Public cloud,the enterprise project contingent worker timesheet booking is possible?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We did run the enterprise project. in this project, the Internal employees and Contingent Workers (Service Performers) are working.

The internal employee's timesheet booking is working. but we did not identify the Contingent worker (Service performer)project task for the timesheet booking.

We posted the PO, but the Project task is not coming. How to book the contingent worker timesheet.

Please advise me.

Thanks & Regards,

MDNRAO

entry.title: Re: How to maintain large number of entries in OVK2/OBAE...
entry.content: You can do this by using an LSMW or an SAP Gui script.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements: List Report Page - Remove or hide...
entry.content: Thanks! It worked. Appreciate your help.

entry.title: Re: BOM template qty in PO
entry.content: Changed in PO. FMS is in quantity

entry.title: Re: BOM template qty in PO
entry.content: PO

entry.title: Unplanned Delivery Cost of Purchasing in S4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
We have discussed Planned Delivery Cost of Purchasing in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. In this blog, let’s discuss the unplanned delivery cost which is sometimes unknown at the time of creating a purchase order.

The unplanned delivery costs are basically managed at the time of posting supplier invoice using APP ‘Create supplier Invoice’ or ‘Create supplier Invoice - Advanced’.

Index

Scenario 1: Unplanned delivery cost with Standard Price

Option 1: Edit the Unplanned Delivery Costs section.

Option 2: Subsequent Debit

Option 3: Post to GL account

Scenario 2: Unplanned delivery cost with Moving Average Price

Option 1: Edit the Unplanned Delivery Costs section.

Option 2: Subsequent Debit

Special Scenario of unplanned delivery cost posting to MVP inventory value

Failed Proposal 1

Promising Proposal 2

 

Scenario 1: Unplanned delivery cost with Standard Price (TD_LQ_06)

 

Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document

Create standard PO without additional freight condition type. After Posting Good Receipt let’s check the FI document before posting invoices.

From traditional GUI PO history point of view. One material document item was created with the same FI document.

Option 1: Edit the Unplanned Delivery Costs section.

In some cases, you need to post the unplanned delivery cost before posting the inventory cost. This can be achieved by adding unplanned delivery cost on the header level while there is no linkage between the unplanned delivery cost and purchase order.

Launch APP ‘Create Supplier Invoices’ to create invoice for goods supplier 1000120. Key in purchase order number 4500000422 in ‘Purchasing document references’ section.

Navigate to ‘Unplanned Delivery Costs’ section, key in Amount and Tax Code.

Corresponding tax items are added automatically in the ‘Tax’ section after manually adding unplanned delivery costs items and pressing ENTER.

Let’s check the simulation result first:

From old PO history view:

Option 2: Subsequent Debit

Create Supplier Invoices

You can use Subsequent Debit to post unplanned delivery costs which can also be tracked in PO history.

Launch APP ‘Create Supplier Invoices’ to create Subsequent Debit for carrier supplier TD_SUP02.

Note I changed the invoicing party to TD_SUP02 because most of the case the carrier is different with the goods supplier.

Simulation result:

In the view of ‘MIRO’, we can see the difference between order and invoice price due to the unplanned costs is posted to price differences account. The unplanned delivery cost, namely, ‘5 CNY’ was posted to PRD account for standard price material.

Option 3: Post to GL account

In case you have specific sub-account for different Purchase surcharge, Eg packaging cost, you can specify corresponding account in the ‘G/L Account Items’ section.

Simulation result:

From MIRO simulation view:

Scenario 2: Unplanned delivery cost with moving average price (TD_LQ_07)

Display material document after posting GR

There is no difference when posting GR with standard price.

Option 1: Edit the Unplanned Delivery Costs section.

Create Purchase Order – Advanced (MIRO)

The function can also be done via APP Create Purchase Order – Advanced (MIRO).

Same as Scenario 1, option 1, the delivery cost was posted to 65050000 Unplanned Delivery costs account.

Option 2: Subsequent Debit

Create Supplier Invoice – Advanced (MIRO)

After posting we can see the delivery cost 5 CNY was posted to Stock account.

The stock value was updated from 400 to 405:

It can also be tracked from PO history view:

Special Scenario of unplanned delivery cost posting to MVP inventory value

A special requirement: The unplanned delivery cost should be posted and added to material inventory value during invoice verification prior to posting good cost.

Failed Proposal 1

This could not be done via subsequent debit because subsequent debit require the subsequent quantity entered should be smaller than quantities that can be debited (IR already done).

Promising Proposal 2

We try to use the ‘Unplanned Delivery Cost’, the option 1 in both Scenarios, at least it allows us posting purchase surcharge prior to goods cost posting.

Now the issue is how to add the delivery cost to stock value instead of posting to the expense account 65050000 (Unplanned Delivery Costs).

Well, we can convert the expense account to stock account via the following APP.

Manage Material Valuation

In Public ERP Cloud, we can leverage the APP manage material valuation.

Step 1: Debit material to account 52531000

Sum all unplanned delivery cost (= 5 CNY for 40 stock quantity in this case) and SAVE.

Accounting document was created. Debit 13600000 Inventory, Credit 52531000 as shown below.

Step 2: Debt 52531000, Credit 65050000

Fiori: Post General Journal Entries

Till now, we reach the balance of unplanned delivery cost, and the value was posted to inventory value. Thanks to my colleague Li Sen @Cloudsen of his guidance on the financial part.

The features covered in this article are based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2402, please refer to the latest information for changes in subsequent versions.

Hope you LIKE it if it addresses your issue. After that, please feel free to comment after following my account and I will reply ASAP.

More

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 后勤常见热点问题汇总FAQ

entry.title: Query regarding SAP Inside Track - Hyderabad 2024
entry.content:
Hi Team, @Ruthvik , @Katherine_K .  I would like to request you regarding the info about "SAP Inside Track - Hyderabad 2024" .

I am eagerly waiting and excited to be part of SAP Inside Track - Hyderabad 2024.

could you please share any update if it is going to be planned soon in Hyderabad.

Thanks and Regards.
